name: Exam Pacer for Kids
description: A time training tool for kids taking practice exams so they can improve their pacing skills. It showws how many question should be attempted by when and whats left over. Can also come handy for adults in some other usecase.

name: Investment Simulator
description: Runs a comparitive analysis of house buying and portfolio management under different contribution and return assumptions, so you can see how it actually compounds over time and what is more fetching in the long run.

name: Internet Speed Testing Bot
description: Raspberry Pi-based tool attached to router ISP via Ethernet that tests your internet speed continiously at scheduled intervals.

name: internet-speed-metrics-visualizer
description: Visualizes the internet speed metrics collected by the Internet Speed Testing Bot in a simple and easy to understand way.

name: Coop Housing Investment Analyser
description: Analyzes the financial viability of cooperative housing investments under different scenarios.

name: Prayer Times Notifier
description: Notifies you of prayer times in your area.

name: Data Compare Visualizer
description: Visualizes differences in data across multiple sources or time periods.

name: Data Triage
description: Helps you identify and prioritize data issues for resolution, ensuring data quality and integrity.
